greeting: Halt. The ruins draw bandits as well as scholars. Which are you?
Welcome to what passes for civilisation out here. Mind the perimeter — I've set snares for wolves.
Another pilgrim headed deeper? The lower chambers aren't safe after dark.
quest: Lord Ashwick's men came through a fortnight past, asking about the old scriptorium. They took what scrolls they could carry and left. I didn't like the look of them, but I'm just one sword against many.
If you're heading into the ruins proper, take a torch and keep your back to the wall. Something moves down there that isn't rats.
idle: I took this post because I was told it would be quiet. Nobody mentioned the wolves.
The scholar keeps odd hours. I hear him muttering over his maps at all hours.
There's a standing stone just north of camp that hums when the wind is right. Unsettling.
